title: dracocephalum heterophyllum subsp. ovalifolium
intro: Dracocephalum heterophyllum subsp. ovalifolium, also known as Oval-leaved Dragon Head, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and improve respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Oval-leaved Dragon Head can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
